microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized system, standardizing agentic workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise clients including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, self-service deployment model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation solution template adopted org-wide.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating solution integration across engineering, product, and client teams.

Built an **internal AI agent** for drill planning and restructured orchestration workflows, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — directly mirroring the agentic workflow experimentation FurtherAI prioritizes.

Served as technical domain expert bridging engineering and enterprise client requirements, partnering with product teams to surface roadmap gaps and deliver **mission-critical features** on accelerated timelines for sovereign and commercial cloud customers.
microsoft_2023: Championed **AI-driven code generation** adoption across Azure, conducting customer-facing demos and enablement sessions that drove utilization across 14 key engineering teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly** through LLM-powered workflow integration.

Shaped the product roadmap to include **intent-based YAML generation** by facilitating 11+ user interviews with Azure service teams, translating client requirements into actionable feature specs that closed critical gaps in the agentic workflow toolchain.

Improved solution deployment speed by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool (RAG-based retrieval), cutting lookup time by 83% and establishing best-practice templates for rapid rollout.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, orchestrating solution integration across 140+ teams with competing roadmap priorities.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual effort** per region launch, then built and socialized a product roadmap to automate critical paths — directly reducing operational toil and enabling scalable, repeatable deployments.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership the visibility needed to target automation gaps, prioritize high-impact integrations, and demonstrate measurable value to executive stakeholders.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating solution rollout across cross-functional engineering and operations teams.

Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a scalable integration workflow for ongoing product releases.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process in a fast-paced, high-ownership startup-style environment.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a new CRM-based process that improved client relationship-building and accelerated deal velocity.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and Google profile to align messaging with target customer needs.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and sealing margin leaks to support data-driven roadmap decisions and scalable business growth.
